codeReview.summary: Auth flow implementation covers login, callback exchange, protected dashboard routes, sign-out, and redirect sanitization. Tests and curl checks support expected behavior and security requirements.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Next.js runtime in this repository uses `proxy.ts` instead of legacy `middleware.ts`; guidance should consistently reflect this to avoid deprecation drift.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Auth feature implemented `src/proxy.ts` and reports deprecation warning context from current Next.js docs.

summary: Pass: authentication and route protection behavior align with foundation requirements with no blocking defects identified.
